response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (The Reference JSON correctly identified the absence of vocal music). 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription was performed for all dialogue, as the Reference JSON provided no text for the spoken content. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles to the precise start of vocal cord activation. Applied instantaneous transitions in the rapid back-and-forth exchange (e.g., at 00:06.200) to prevent any perceived delay.
